title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Carrier India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Carrier India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
